steps: Go to https://app.bamboohr.com and log in as an Account Owner or Admin
Navigate to Settings (gear icon) in the top navigation
Enter a descriptive name for the key and click 'Generate Key'
Copy the generated API key — it is shown only once
To authenticate, base64-encode 'api_key:x' (where x is the literal character x) and send as 'Authorization: Basic <encoded>'
Replace {companyDomain} in API URLs with your BambooHR subdomain (e.g., mycompany)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your BambooHR API key. Authenticate using Basic auth with the key as username and 'x' as password: base64('api_key:x').

notes: API key is shown only once at creation — copy it before closing the dialog
Authentication uses HTTP Basic: base64(api_key + ':x') — the password is always the literal letter 'x'
All API URLs include your company subdomain: https://api.bamboohr.com/api/gateway.php/{companyDomain}/v1/
Only Account Owners and Admins can generate API keys
No free public tier — requires an active BambooHR subscription

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the employee directory to verify your API key and company domain
